svg.aria-label: Cloud Security 8-batch OT roadmap bridging skill gap and AI attack pressure with a structured 9-week curriculum covering DevSecOps and FinOps, leading to certification path outcomes and measurable talent leap with graduates reducing cloud incident MTTD by 60 percent and achieving AWS Security Specialty and CKS certification within the program timeline.
svg.title: 2025-11-21: 8-batch OT roadmap, 9-week DevSecOps+FinOps path

g.text: Skill gap : AI attack : no path
Skill gap wide : AI attack toolkits rising : no...
Entry engineers no cloud sec : AI tools blur...
Cloud sec knowledge scattered : no mentorship : cert...
Week 1-3 infra sec : week 4-6 DevSecOps CICD : week...
Hands-on lab every week : peer review : capstone project...
AWS Security Specialty : CKS cert : MTTD cut 60%...
AWS Security Specialty pass rate 85% : CKS 78% : job...
Graduates cut MTTD 60% : salary +30% : cloud sec engineer...
